## Summary

Describe the current behavior implemented by this change and the problem it addresses.

## Scope

- [ ] Color widget
- [ ] Monochrome/grayscale telemetry script
- [ ] GPS sensor discovery
- [ ] Build or release tooling
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation only

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] `npm run package`
- [ ] `git diff --exit-code -- dist`

## Hardware evidence

List each physical radio and EdgeTX version tested. Label simulator or host-harness results clearly; do not present them as physical validation.

## Documentation

- [ ] Every new local Lua function has detailed inline documentation.
- [ ] Lua comments describe current behavior and contain no release history.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` and the release note are updated when applicable.
- [ ] Sensitive coordinates are removed from screenshots and logs.
